### Visual Evidence

### Checklist for Justine

- [ ] UI matches the wireframe intent.
- [ ] Component logic is functional.
- [ ] No breaking change was made to infrastructure or runtime config files without review.
- [ ] Responsive behavior was checked.
- [ ] Shared frontend primitives were reused instead of duplicated.
- [ ] PR is scoped to one issue / one ownership branch.
- [ ] Required workflows are green before merge.
